mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production_result ( result_id, order_id, product_id, lot_no, actual_qty, defect_qty, worker_name, started_at, ended_at, created_at, progress_rate, cumulative_qty ) VALUES ( #{resultId}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{actualQty}, #{defectQty}, #{workerName}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{progressRate}, #{cumulativeQty} )
mapper.select: SELECT result_id, order_id, product_id, lot_no, actual_qty, defect_qty, worker_name, started_at, ended_at, created_at FROM production_result ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT LPAD( IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(result_id, 14, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3,'0' ) FROM production_result WHERE result_id LIKE CONCAT('PRS-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '%')
SELECT LPAD( IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(lot_no, -3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3,'0' ) FROM production_result WHERE lot_no LIKE CONCAT('LOT-', #{productCode}, '-', #{dateStr}, '%')

SELECT -- production_result pr.result_id, pr.order_id, pr.product_id, pr.lot_no, pr.actual_qty, pr.defect_qty, pr.worker_name, pr.started_at, pr.ended_at, pr.created_at,
-- work_order wo.status, wo.order_qty, wo.order_manager AS orderManager,
-- product / line p.product_name AS productName, pl.line_name AS lineName,
-- 누적(양품)과 잔여 COALESCE(agg.good_sum, 0) AS producedQty, COALESCE(agg.def_sum, 0) AS defectQtyTotal, GREATEST(wo.order_qty - COALESCE(agg.good_sum, 0), 0) AS remainingQty
FROM production_result pr LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON wo.line_id = pl.line_id
-- 주문별 누적 집계 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(GREATEST(actual_qty - COALESCE(defect_qty,0), 0)) AS good_sum, SUM(COALESCE(defect_qty,0)) AS def_sum FROM production_result GROUP BY order_id ) agg ON agg.order_id = pr.order_id
1=1
AND DATE(pr.created_at) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(pr.created_at) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND wo.status = #{status}
AND ( pr.worker_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY pr.created_at ${sortOrder} ORDER BY pr.lot_no ${sortOrder} ORDER BY pr.order_id ${sortOrder} ORDER BY pr.actual_qty ${sortOrder} ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM production_result pr LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.product_id
1=1
AND DATE(pr.created_at) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(pr.created_at) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND wo.status = #{status}
AND ( pr.worker_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT pr.result_id, pr.order_id, pr.product_id, pr.lot_no, pr.actual_qty, pr.defect_qty, pr.worker_name, pr.started_at, pr.ended_at, pr.created_at, pr.progress_rate, pr.cumulative_qty, wo.status, wo.order_qty, wo.order_manager AS orderManager, p.product_name AS productName, pl.line_name AS lineName, -- 누적/잔여(해당 오더 기준) COALESCE(agg.good_sum, 0) AS producedQty, COALESCE(agg.def_sum, 0) AS defectQtyTotal, GREATEST(wo.order_qty - COALESCE(agg.good_sum, 0), 0) AS remainingQty FROM production_result pr LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON wo.line_id = pl.line_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(GREATEST(actual_qty - COALESCE(defect_qty,0), 0)) AS good_sum, SUM(COALESCE(defect_qty,0)) AS def_sum FROM production_result GROUP BY order_id ) agg ON agg.order_id = pr.order_id WHERE pr.result_id = #{resultId}

SELECT w.order_id, w.order_qty AS targetQty, COALESCE(a.good_sum, 0) AS producedQty, COALESCE(a.def_sum, 0) AS defectQty, GREATEST(w.order_qty - COALESCE(a.good_sum, 0), 0) AS remainingQty, w.status FROM work_order w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(GREATEST(actual_qty - COALESCE(defect_qty,0), 0)) AS good_sum, SUM(COALESCE(defect_qty,0)) AS def_sum FROM production_result WHERE order_id = #{orderId} GROUP BY order_id ) a ON a.order_id = w.order_id WHERE w.order_id = #{orderId}
